subject: [DOC] Add missing parameters for basic_cnf
commit_message:
[DOC] Add missing parameters for basic_cnf

The parameter of the target k8s infrastructure was not indicated
in the documentation
it was set in CI properly but hard to guess...

Issue-ID: INT-1888

Signed-off-by: morganrol <morgan.richomme@orange.com>
Change-Id: I4ce557b575a22525fada86eb4459005b0a3ad8f8

entries.message:

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/30/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/30/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/30/ )
